ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft that flew the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route flown by the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who flew the flight */,
  "copilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the copilot */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number */,
  "flight_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight type */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "flight_plan" TEXT /* Flight plan details */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Total fuel consumed during the flight */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if maintenance is needed after the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_flight_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_type_id") REFERENCES flight_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_copilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("copilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., Boeing 737, Airbus A320) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the aircraft */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft model */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "total_flying_hours" REAL /* Total flying hours of the aircraft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "flight_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that the data point belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data point */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data point (e.g., meters, degrees) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was collected */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data unit */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight parameter */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., altitude, airspeed) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., meters, knots) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter unit */,
  "parameter_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter */,
  "parameter_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the parameter */,
  "parameter_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_parameters_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES parameter_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., fuel efficiency, climb rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., liters per hour, meters per second) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  "metric_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the metric */,
  "metric_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, engineer, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft model (e.g., commercial, military) */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the aircraft model */,
  "max_range" REAL /* Maximum range of the aircraft model */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft model */,
  "cruise_altitude" REAL /* Typical cruising altitude of the aircraft model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight type */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the flight type */,
  "fuel_consumption_rate" REAL /* Typical fuel consumption rate of the flight type */,
  "passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Typical passenger capacity of the flight type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_range" REAL /* Range of the sensor */,
  "sensor_precision" REAL /* Precision of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the data unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness" (
  "fitness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that the fitness data belongs to */,
  "fitness_value" REAL /* Value of the fitness data */,
  "fitness_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the fitness data */,
  "fitness_source" TEXT /* Source of the fitness data */,
  "fitness_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the fitness data */,
  "fitness_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fitness data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
